name: Guilt pressure
description: Uses emotional debt or remorse to reduce clear choice.

name: Urgency pressure
description: Compresses time so reflection feels impossible.

name: Identity pressure
description: Makes belonging, loyalty, faith, family, or worth feel conditional.

name: Authority pressure
description: Uses status or certainty to discourage honest questions.

name: Care pressure
description: Uses concern or affection while reducing agency.

name: Fear pressure
description: Uses future pain, regret, or threat to override reflection.

name: Confusion fog
description: Uses contradiction, overload, or moving definitions to make clear thinking harder.

name: Isolation pressure
description: Cuts someone away from trusted outside support or perspective.

name: Shame pressure
description: Attacks the person instead of discussing the decision.
